title: Stargate Journey: Refreshed
description: A remaster of SGJourney textures and models
body:
Stargate Journey: Refreshed is a resourcepack that replaces a significant amount of assets - Textures and models, with more refined alternatives.

Currently, these are the changed things:
- New Stargate & DHD textures
- New textures for almost all items
- New machinery & block textures
- New GUI textures
- Shader emissiveness support

Stay tuned for more, and join official Stargate Journey discord for communication!
